title: TS2 1EQ, European Metal Recycling Limited: environmental permit issued – EPR/DP3421SN/A001
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit and decision document for:    Operator name: European Metal Recycling Limited   Installation name: EMR Middlesbrough Granulation   Permit number: EPR/DP3421SN/A001   "
